title: Study links poor air quality to drop in innovation
description: Research by academics at Duke Kunshan and Shanghai Jiao Tong University connecting pollution to a drop in patent applications could have implications for policymakers.
text:
Study links poor air quality to drop in innovation
Research by academics at Duke Kunshan and Shanghai Jiao Tong University connecting pollution to a drop in patent applications could have implications for policymakers.
